intent: Fix Type and Sort dropdowns so they scroll with the file toolbar and use a more opaque, readable panel surface.
assumptions: The dropdown floating bug is caused by body-level portal rendering plus viewport-fixed positioning.
The follow-up cover bug is caused by the scaled toolbar wrapper creating a transform stacking context below file content.
The filter toolbar can host absolute dropdown panels without clipping.
Dropdown panels should use stronger opacity than the filter trigger surface.
risks: Moving the dropdown back into the toolbar could reintroduce clipping if overflow is hidden.
Sibling filter cards could cover the open dropdown without a higher stacking order.
Raising only the dropdown panel can still fail if its transformed toolbar parent remains under later file-content layers.
Theme tokens must remain readable in both dark and light modes.
steps: Add failing regression tests for in-container dropdown rendering and non-fixed CSS.
Remove createPortal and fixed viewport positioning from DropdownMenu.
Anchor the dropdown panel absolutely to the trigger card and raise the open card above siblings.
Raise the transformed toolbar wrapper above file content so the in-container dropdown is not covered.
Add dropdown-specific stronger surface tokens for dark and light themes.
Run focused filter tests, full frontend tests, lint, and build.
Add permanent constraint and quality score entry.
